syntax_12744.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_12744.title: Citizen Forcefield
syntax_12744.description: Creates a forcefield around the NPCs with the specified width, height, strength and vertical strength.
syntax_12744.syntax_pattern:
make %npcs% have %npcforcefield%
remove forcefield of %npcs%
remove %npcs%['s] forcefield

en: Creates a forcefield around the NPCs with the specified width, height, strength and vertical strength.

Called when a Citizens NPC is left clicked by a player.
Only is called if NPC is not vulnerable.

(citizen|npc)[s] %npcs% (is|can be|are) target(able|ed)

en: Make a Citizens NPC targetable by other mobs.

en: Sets the citizen with the id specified to the skin linked on the url.

syntax_12791.creator: Nagasonic

Represents the 'pose' of a Citizens NPC.
Essentially different animations, depending on the entity type of the NPC.

Represents the 'pose' of a Citizens NPC.
Essentially different animations, depending on the entity type of the NPC.

syntax_12754.creator: Nagasonic

Make a citizen targetable to other mobs.
Or you can stop this process.
syntax_12754.syntax_pattern:
make (citizen|npc) %npc% [[able to] be] target(ed|able) [temporarily]
make (citizen|npc) %npc% not [[able to] be] target(ed|able) [temporarily]

en:
Make a citizen targetable to other mobs.
Or you can stop this process.

syntax_14878.syntax_pattern:

syntax_14879.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_14879.title: Citizen Mirror
syntax_14879.description: Enable/Disable a Citizens NPC's Mirror Trait
syntax_14879.syntax_pattern:
enable (npc|citizen)[s] %npcs% mirror [with name] [[and] with equipment]
disable (npc|citizen)[s] %npcs% mirror

en: Enable/Disable a Citizens NPC's Mirror Trait

syntax_12772.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_12772.title: Forcefield - Create
syntax_12772.description: Expression to create a Citizens Forcefield. Default values are 1.
syntax_12772.syntax_pattern: [a] forcefield [with width %number%[,| and]] [[with] height %number%[,| and]] [[with] strength %number%[,| and]] [[with] vertical strength %number%]

en: Expression to create a Citizens Forcefield. Default values are 1.

syntax_13050.creator: Nagasonic
syntax_13050.title: Hitbox With
syntax_13050.description:
A Citizen Hitbox with the given components.
Scale is a multiplier for the hitbox. For example, if the width was 1 and the height was 2, then if the scale was 2, the hitbox's effective dimenstions would be 2 width and 4 height.
Default values are:
- Scale: 1
- Width: 1
- Height: 2
syntax_13050.syntax_pattern: [a] hitbox [with scale %number%[,| and]] [[with] width %number%[,| and]] [[with] height %number%]

en:
A Citizen Hitbox with the given components.
Scale is a multiplier for the hitbox. For example, if the width was 1 and the height was 2, then if the scale was 2, the hitbox's effective dimenstions would be 2 width and 4 height.
Default values are:
- Scale: 1
- Width: 1
- Height: 2
Represesnts a Citizens Forcefield
Represesnts a Citizens Hitbox

syntax_13051.creator: Nagasonic

Represents a Chat Color, different from Skript's Color class.
Although not a Citizens type, the only current use is in the Citizen Glow effect.
syntax_13051.type_usage: magic, dark green, green, underline, black, yellow, dark red, dark purple, light purple, bold, italic, gold, dark gray, red, aqua, gray, blue, white, reset, strikethrough, dark aqua, dark blue

en:
Represents a Chat Color, different from Skript's Color class.
Although not a Citizens type, the only current use is in the Citizen Glow effect.
